categories.name: Newsletter
categories.description: Recurring subscription emails, mailing-list updates, product announcements, blog digests, event promotions, release notes, or marketing campaigns sent in bulk by automated systems and usually not expecting a personal reply.

categories.name: Personal
categories.description: Direct one-to-one emails from real people about personal matters, casual conversation, invitations, greetings, family topics, plans, or other non-business communication that is not automated and not part of a mass mailing.

categories.name: Billing
categories.description: Emails about invoices, bills, receipts, payments, refunds, charges, pricing, subscription fees, transaction confirmations, or payment problems, including reminders and questions about money owed or paid.

categories.name: Accounts
categories.description: Emails about account access or account management, such as password resets, login alerts, email verification, security notices, profile changes, subscription settings, account updates, or account closure requests.
